name: Razer
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, setup showcase, esports integration
notes: Strong creator program; brand recognition does a lot of the selling for you

name: PlayStation
collaborationStyle: game launch campaign, console review, exclusive gameplay integration
notes: Reserved for large channels; primarily agency-mediated; strong fit for AAA game and console review creators

name: Xbox / Microsoft Gaming
collaborationStyle: Game Pass showcase, console review, exclusive title launch
notes: Game Pass is a highly sponsorable product; more creator-accessible than PlayStation for mid-tier channels

name: ASUS ROG
collaborationStyle: PC build showcase, peripheral review, esports integration
notes: Republic of Gamers brand; strong fit for PC building, hardware review, and esports creators

name: Nvidia
collaborationStyle: GPU review, PC build integration, ray tracing showcase
notes: Most coveted GPU brand in gaming; high CPM due to premium tech audience; agency-mediated for large deals

name: AMD
collaborationStyle: CPU/GPU review, PC build showcase, performance benchmark
notes: Strong alternative to Nvidia; slightly more creator-accessible; great fit for PC build and hardware review channels

name: Logitech G
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, setup showcase, esports integration
notes: One of the most widely recognized gaming peripheral brands; very active creator program across all tiers

name: Nintendo
collaborationStyle: game launch integration, console showcase, family gaming content
notes: Notoriously protective of their IP; sponsorships are rare but highly valuable when they occur

name: HyperX
collaborationStyle: headset review, setup showcase, esports integration
notes: HP-owned gaming peripheral brand; extremely active sponsorship program; one of the most creator-accessible iconic brands in gaming

name: Alienware
collaborationStyle: gaming laptop review, high-end PC showcase, setup tour
notes: Dell's premium gaming brand; strong fit for high-end PC gaming and setup creators; selective but active program

name: GFuel
collaborationStyle: drink integration, custom flavor collab, discount code
notes: Iconic gaming energy drink; one of the most widely distributed gaming sponsorships; easy integration

name: SteelSeries
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, setup showcase, competitive gaming integration
notes: Strong alternative to Razer for peripheral sponsorships; very active creator program

name: Corsair
collaborationStyle: PC build integration, peripheral review, RGB setup showcase
notes: Covers peripherals, PC components, and streaming gear; wide product range makes for flexible integrations

name: Secretlab
collaborationStyle: gaming chair review, setup tour, long-session comfort story
notes: Leading gaming chair brand; extremely active sponsorship program with wide creator range

name: Epidemic Sound
collaborationStyle: music licensing story, content creation workflow, mid-roll segment
notes: Royalty-free music platform; universal fit for any gaming creator who produces edited video content

name: NordVPN
collaborationStyle: mid-roll segment, gaming security story, evergreen integration
notes: Extremely common gaming channel sponsor; easy evergreen integration regardless of content sub-niche

name: Elgato
collaborationStyle: streaming setup review, capture card showcase, studio tour
notes: Corsair-owned streaming gear brand; ideal for YouTube/Twitch setup and streaming-focused gaming creators

name: Turtle Beach
collaborationStyle: headset review, console gaming integration, competitive audio story
notes: Leading console gaming headset brand; strong fit for console-focused and competitive multiplayer creators

name: Twitch
collaborationStyle: streaming story, platform integration, gaming lifestyle content
notes: Platform-level sponsorships for creators who also stream; strong crossover for YouTube gaming creators with Twitch presence

name: NZXT
collaborationStyle: PC build showcase, case review, clean aesthetic setup
notes: PC cases and components brand; strong fit for creators who prioritize clean aesthetic PC builds

name: Astro Gaming
collaborationStyle: headset reviews, console and PC audio setups, esports content
notes: Headset brand popular with console and esports players; good fit for competitive and controller-first channels

name: BenQ / Zowie
collaborationStyle: monitor reviews, esports aim/latency content, pro-setup tours
notes: Monitor line deeply associated with competitive FPS; ideal for ranked and aim-focused creators

name: DXRacer
collaborationStyle: gaming chair reviews, long-session comfort content, setup tours
notes: Legacy gaming chair brand; a good alternative to Secretlab for mid-tier creators

name: Streamlabs
collaborationStyle: overlay/tutorial content, donation and alerts workflow, streaming setup guides
notes: Streaming software and tools; ideal for creators teaching streaming setups and monetization

name: GameStop (campaign-based)
collaborationStyle: launch event coverage, physical/digital game promos, collector’s editions
notes: Occasional campaigns around big launches; good fit for console, physical media, and collector-focused channels

name: Backbone
collaborationStyle: mobile gaming review, controller showcase, travel gaming
notes: Mobile game controller growing rapidly; good fit for console and mobile crossover creators

name: Glorious
collaborationStyle: mouse/keyboard review, modding showcase, competitive setup content
notes: Cult gaming peripheral brand popular with enthusiasts; ideal for creators covering competitive or modding content

name: Ironside Computers
collaborationStyle: custom PC showcase, build reveal, gaming setup tour
notes: Custom PC builder with an active creator program; good fit for gaming setup and PC build channels

name: Mobalytics
collaborationStyle: rank improvement story, analytics demo, coaching integration
notes: Gaming analytics and coaching platform; ideal for creators focused on ranked improvement in games like LoL, Valorant, or TFT

name: Xtrfy
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, esports gear showcase, competitive setup
notes: Esports peripheral brand from Sweden; niche but loyal following among competitive FPS players

name: Artisan Mousepads
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, competitive setup showcase, mousepad comparison
notes: Japanese premium mousepad brand with cult following among competitive FPS players; ideal for hyper-niche peripheral review creators

name: Scuf Gaming
collaborationStyle: controller review, competitive console gaming story, pro-setup showcase
notes: Custom pro controller brand for console gamers; ideal for competitive console gaming creators covering FPS or sports games

name: Drop (Massdrop)
collaborationStyle: mechanical keyboard review, enthusiast gear showcase, collab product drop
notes: Community-driven gear brand known for mechanical keyboards and audiophile products; ideal for keyboard enthusiast and setup creators

name: Jinx
collaborationStyle: gaming apparel showcase, merch integration, gaming lifestyle content
notes: Gaming apparel and merchandise brand; ideal for creators with a strong gaming lifestyle or pop culture angle

name: Litter Robot
collaborationStyle: gaming setup integration, pet + gaming lifestyle story, product showcase
notes: Automatic litter box brand that actively sponsors gaming creators; surprisingly strong conversion among gamer-pet-owner audience

name: Displate
collaborationStyle: setup decoration showcase, gaming art integration, room tour
notes: Metal gaming and pop culture art prints; extremely popular with gaming setup creators; easy room tour integration

name: Thermaltake
collaborationStyle: PC build showcase, case/cooling review, RGB setup integration
notes: PC cases, cooling, and peripherals brand; active creator program; good fit for PC building and modding creators

name: Ubisoft
collaborationStyle: game launch integration, sponsored gameplay, campaign review
notes: More creator-accessible than Sony or Nintendo for game sponsorships; actively seeks mid-tier gaming creators for launches

name: Humble Bundle
collaborationStyle: bundle highlight videos, charity-focused content, backlog and discovery content
notes: Game bundles and store with revenue sharing to charity; ideal for PC gaming and indie discovery channels

name: Epic Games Store
collaborationStyle: storefront promotions, free game highlights, creator code integrations
brandPersonality: bold, publisher/publisher hybrid, creator-code-friendly, PC store challenger
notes: Creator code program offers revenue share; natural fit for creators recommending PC games on a regular basis
